name: RxNorm Current Prescribable Content
redistribution_status: Do not redistribute the raw archive from this repository; reproduce it from the official dated URL.
known_limitations: The subset contains active prescribable content and excludes obsolete and historical concepts.
The competition RxNorm release and target term-type policy are hidden.
